title: NTPC Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Assistant Officer Posts
description: The National Thermal Power Corporation (NTPC) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 20 Assistant Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech, Post-graduation, PGDM, M.Sc., can apply for the NTPC Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, ...
